---
title: "Review of UAV based research"
id: material-introduction-3
summary: "A recent review of UAS applications in landscape ecology, covering major themes, sensors, processing, spatial analysis, and emerging opportunities."
source_url: "https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10980-024-02040-6"

modules:
  - module-introduction
  - module-hs
Goals:
  - module-goals
  - module-goals-hs
activities: []
assessments:
  - assessment
  - assessment-hs
labels:
  - supplement
  - recommended
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/Hardware_Software/material-hs-1.md"
---

## Read the article:

[Applications of unoccupied aerial systems (UAS) in landscape ecology: a review of recent research, challenges and emerging opportunities](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0924271621003282)

---

[**Module:** UAV based remote Sensing - A Brief Overview](../modules/module-introduction.qmd)
